- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:36:       %{line: 3, content: "- oops", reason: :malformed_item}
- missing from embed  tasks/036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics_01/solution.ex:5:   Parses `## category` sections and their `- **Name**: description (tags)` bullet
- missing from embed  tasks/036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics_01/solution.ex:6:   items, and additionally reports — with 1-indexed line numbers — every line it
- missing from embed  tasks/036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics_01/solution.ex:7:   could not interpret: unsupported headings, malformed bullets, orphan items
- missing from embed  tasks/036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics_01/solution.ex:8:   (before any heading), and duplicate categories (whose sections are suppressed).

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:41: Diagnostic rules to implement (line numbers are 1-indexed against the original document, before any splitting on the next heading):

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:42: - **`:unsupported_heading`** — a heading with one `#` (H1) or three-plus `#` (H3+). It is reported and does **not** open a category, but it also does **not** close the currently open category (a following item still attaches to that category).

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:43: - **`:malformed_item`** — a line that starts at column zero with `- ` (a single dash and whitespace) but does not match the `- **Name**: description` format. (Space-indented / nested bullets are NOT reported — they are silently ignored.)

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:44: - **`:orphan_item`** — a well-formed bullet item that appears before any `##` heading has opened a category. It is reported and discarded.

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:45: - **`:duplicate_category`** — a `##` heading whose (trimmed) title equals one already seen. It is reported, the earlier category is flushed, and the duplicate section is **suppressed**: bullet items under it are silently ignored (not reported as orphans) until the next distinct heading.
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:48: - `categories` are in document order; items within a category are in document order.

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:49: - Every reported error carries the original (trailing-whitespace-trimmed) line content and its 1-indexed line number; `errors` are in ascending line order.
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:50: - Tags are trimmed individually and empty tags dropped; category titles are trimmed.
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:51: - The empty string returns `%{categories: [], errors: []}`.

- extra in embed      tasks/wt_036_003_error_reporting_markdown_parser_with_line_diagnostics/prompt.md:53: Give me the complete module in a single file. Use only the Elixir standard library — no external dependencies.
